info.title: VSVV Premium Broker API
info.description:
API documentation for the **VSVV Premium Broker** application.

**Authentication:** Most endpoints require the `api_key` header. If using Swagger UI, click the **Authorize** button at the top of the page and enter your API key before trying any endpoint.

get.summary: List AccountingEntry records
get.description: Retrieve a list of AccountingEntry records with optional filtering, sorting, and pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Field name to sort by. Prefix with '-' for descending order, e.g. -created_date

delete.description: **Warning:** Passing an empty `{}` query will delete ALL records in this entity.

schema.description: Query filter to match records to delete

put.description: Each item must include an 'id' field along with the fields to update.

patch.summary: Update many AccountingEntry records by query
patch.description: Update multiple records matching a query filter. Supports MongoDB update operators ($set, $inc, $push, $pull).

get.summary: Get a AccountingEntry record by ID

delete.description: Soft-deletes the record. Use the restore endpoint to undo.
